Hot Pursuit (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $34,580,201Details
International Box Office $17,100,000
Worldwide Box Office $51,680,201
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $7,665,004
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,482,633
Total $10,147,637
Further financial details...

Synopsis

An uptight and by-the-book cop tries to protect the sexy and outgoing widow of a drug boss as they race through Texas, pursued by crooked cops and murderous gunmen.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,942,258 (40.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.48 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:66.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,003 opening theaters/3,037 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $49,060,398

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 8th, 2015 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: May 8th, 2015 (Wide) (Taiwan)
May 15th, 2015 (Wide) (Poland)
June 11th, 2015 (Wide) (Australia)
June 11th, 2015 (Wide) (New Zealand)
June 11th, 2015 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
Video Release: July 28th, 2015 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content, violence, language and some drug material.
(Rating bulletin 2367, 4/1/2015)
Running Time: 87 minutes
Plot point: Corrupt Cops, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Drug Cartels, Fugitive / On the Run, Road Trip
Social setting: Organized Crime
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Pacific Standard
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
